creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244920
Patch for libnghttp2

Use CMake for consistency

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Tested with following consumers in Poudriere (13.2-RELEASE amd64):
biology/ncbi-blast+
devel/aws-sdk-cpp
devel/libsoup3
dns/bind-tools
dns/bind9-devel
dns/bind918
dns/dnsperf
dns/flamethrower
dns/knot-resolver
dns/knot3
dns/unbound
ftp/curl
lang/julia
net/sakisafecli
net/wireshark
science/lammps
security/bitwarden-cli
security/wazuh-agent
security/wazuh-manager
sysutils/libdnf
www/apache24
www/envoy (marked BROKEN) - unrelated
www/mod_http2
www/nghttp2
www/node16
www/node18
www/node20
www/wget2
devel/clixon
